allow: PowerShell($g = Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($g\) { "gh: $\($g.Source\)"; gh auth status } else { "gh NOT INSTALLED" })

PowerShell($gh = "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"; if \(Test-Path $gh\) { & $gh --version; "---"; & $gh auth status } else { "not at default path"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue })

PowerShell($gh = "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"; & $gh release view 1.0.0-beta.1 --repo politiapps/tasker --json tagName,isPrerelease,assets | & $gh.Replace\($gh,'C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe'\) -Command '$input | ConvertFrom-Json | ForEach-Object { "tag: $\($_.tagName\)"; "prerelease: $\($_.isPrerelease\)"; "assets:"; $_.assets | ForEach-Object { " - $\($_.name\) \($\($_.size\) bytes\)" } }')

PowerShell($gh = "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"; $r = & $gh release view 1.0.0-beta.1 --repo politiapps/tasker --json tagName,isPrerelease,assets | ConvertFrom-Json; "tag: $\($r.tagName\)"; "prerelease: $\($r.isPrerelease\)"; "assets:"; $r.assets | ForEach-Object { " - $\($_.name\) \($\($_.size\) bytes\)" })

PowerShell($gh = "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; $run = \(& $gh run list --repo politiapps/tasker --workflow release.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId,status | ConvertFrom-Json\)[0]; & $gh run watch $run.databaseId --repo politiapps/tasker --exit-status; "EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE"; $r = & $gh release view 1.0.1-beta.3 --repo politiapps/tasker --json assets | ConvertFrom-Json; "assets:"; $r.assets | ForEach-Object { " - $\($_.name\) \($\($_.size\) bytes\)" })

Inherited tag pills are hidden on subtasks, and a task renders in only one section, so nothing appears twice."; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; $run = \(& $gh run list --repo politiapps/tasker --workflow release.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId | ConvertFrom-Json\)[0]; & $gh run watch $run.databaseId --repo politiapps/tasker --exit-status; "EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE"; \($r = & $gh release view 1.0.1-beta.6 --repo politiapps/tasker --json assets | ConvertFrom-Json\).assets | ForEach-Object { " - $\($_.name\)" })
